title: Canva vs WordPress
description: Compare Canva vs WordPress — a design & creative platform versus a web design solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: Canva (Design & Creative) and WordPress (Web Design) serve different primary purposes. Canva has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is design & creative or web design capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Canva and WordPress?
faqs.answer: Canva is a design & creative tool, while WordPress is a web design platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can Canva replace WordPress?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, Canva or WordPress?
faqs.answer: Canva (Free – $12.99/mo) and WordPress (Open Source (Free – $45/mo)) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
